final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书-style vertical cover image for a 素人 (everyday creator) media post about 大疆 Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" 小红书 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 九宫格 (3×3 grid) layout arranged as a single vertical cover image
Subject: must include the 大疆 Pocket 4 camera as the featured product, presented naturally as a 素人 unboxing / first-impression style
Scene/backdrop: needs a casual, everyday lifestyle backdrop — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, approachable, everyday atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, youthful direction fitting 小红书 素人 content — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" as the central title (large, primary, cute and differentiated font style)
Constraints: must preserve 九宫格 grid structure visible within the single vertical cover; title text must use a cute, distinctive, differentiated font treatment
Avoid: overly polished commercial advertising look; must avoid studio-perfect lighting that breaks the 素人 authenticity
